description: Style NoteWedge heels have been a summer staple and with catwalk's new innovations they still remain in fashion. These pretty bright coloured heels will make you look stunning and can be matched with a skirt or a pair of capris.Heel: 2.5''Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with thin peachy orange straps at the forefoot and an ankle loop with a zipperBeads along the forefoot with a brown footbed with a heel patchWedge heels with mat weave styling on the sidesTPU outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
